fields.name: Charge Per Line
fields.tooltip: Specifies that additional fees are calculated per document line.

fields.name: Reminder Terms Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the reminder terms code for the reminder.

fields.name: Reminder Level No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the total of the additional fee amounts on the reminder lines.

fields.name: Currency Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the currency that is used on the entry.

fields.name: Threshold Remaining Amount
fields.tooltip: Specifies the amount that remains before the additional fee is incurred.

fields.name: Additional Fee Amount
fields.tooltip: Specifies the line amount of the additional fee.

fields.name: Additional Fee %
fields.tooltip: Specifies the percentage of the total amount that makes up the additional fee.

fields.name: Min. Additional Fee Amount
fields.tooltip: Specifies the lowest amount that a fee can be.

fields.name: Max. Additional Fee Amount
fields.tooltip: Specifies the highest amount that a fee can be.
